reviews.comment:
Ideal para cargar nafta y descansar en la ruta 9, muy buen lugar tranquilo con arboleda, mesa y parrillas.

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for refueling and resting on Route 9, a very nice quiet place with trees, a table and grills.

reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio, que desde que tengo uso de razón (yendo a Córdoba)... paramos siempre.
Es una lida estación de servicio (no moderna), pero con mesas bajo los árboles... ideal para parar un rato y descansar.
No le puse 5 estrellas, porque me pareció un poco caro la cafetería y el kiosco.

(Translated by Google)
It's a gas station that we've been stopping at for as long as I can remember (on my way to Córdoba)... all the time.
It's a nice gas station (not modern), but with tables under the trees... ideal for stopping for a while and resting.
I didn't give it 5 stars because I thought the cafeteria and kiosk were a bit pricey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRN09xa0JREAE

reviews.comment:
Lo  conocí hace casi 20 años. Desde el conc esionario, a todos sus empleados se destacan por igual. No dejo de parar en cada viaje a Córdoba.

(Translated by Google)
I met him almost 20 years ago. From the dealership to every employee, they all stand out equally. I make sure to stop by on every trip to Córdoba.

reviews.comment:
Este lugar te salva la vida si vas viajando de bs as a cba con el aire prendido, si no fuera por este, más de uno se hubiera quedado en medio de la nada. Es un lugar chiquito pero tiene todo lo que se necesita

(Translated by Google)
This place is a lifesaver if you're traveling from Buenos Aires to Buenos Aires City with the air conditioning on. If it weren't for it, more than one person would have been stuck in the middle of nowhere. It's a small place, but it has everything you need.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNk5EeEpnEAE

reviews.comment:
Hace años que paro en este ACA, camino a Córdoba. Facil acceso, buena atención, zona de descanso a 2 km. de la autopista 9. Sugerencia: deben adaptar el posnet a la Nativa. Recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
I've been stopping at this ACA for years on my way to Córdoba. Easy access, good service, rest area 2 km from Highway 9. Suggestion: they should adapt the POS terminal to the Nativa card. Recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMzVQRkF3EAE
